description: Multi-state validation configuration with auto-generated positive states and manual negative/positive states
_note_multi_chain: Supports both single-chain and multi-chain targets. For oligomers/multimers, provide chain_id as array (e.g., ['A','B','C','D'])
_comment_auto_generation: Automatic positive state generation from native target
_note_auto_gen: Automatically generates 2 positive states: (1) AF2 alternate conformation, (2) OpenMM relaxed/equilibrated. (Native state NOT included)

target_states.name: BSA
target_states.description: Bovine Serum Albumin - common off-target protein (583aa monomer)

target_states.name: Streptavidin
target_states.description: Streptavidin dimer - another common off-target (248aa dimer)

positive_validation._note: Scoring parameters for positive states (on-target binding)

scoring._note_interface_contacts: Target number of AF2 i_cmap predicted contacts (prob > 0.5) for optimal binding score

negative_validation._note: Scoring parameters for negative states (off-target specificity)

scoring._note_iptm: ipTM values above this reduce specificity score
scoring._note_pae: Interface pAE values below this reduce specificity score
scoring._note_contacts: Contact counts above this reduce specificity score
